I never say Eastern daylight or Eastern standard because I don't think most people have any idea What which one of those two they're in at the moment a second bonus tip? Actually like to do webinars sales webinars to the group of people who are participating in my launch But they run before the cart actually opens those who attend the webinar can buy on the webinar for everyone else the the cart is still closed and And note also when you send out replays give them the recording for the webinar that they actually Attended with an exception of if you really nailed one performance Send that one out and explain it away So I know those last two started talking about recordings Well, that's because remember I told you I'm I will hold three separate webinars for a key webinar And so as I'm sending out the recording I just make sure I'm sending out the recording that they actually attended so if they want to hear the answer to their specific question or Rehear something that I talked about in their particular webinar They've got a chance to be able to do that Let's talk about how long your registration for your webinar should actually be open So we actually have two opposite factors Pulling on us in regards to webinar registration First one is the desire to get as many people register for the webinar as possible That tends to push us to a longer registration period But the second one is the desire to get as many registrants to attend The webinar is possible because it doesn't do much good if someone signs up for the webinar But then doesn't come to it that argues for a shorter registration period so two very opposite pulls here When it gets right down to it Getting people to attend Tends to be more important than getting people to register So we usually want only three to five days in the webinar registration period I sometimes will see people especially in the business to business space Opening up registration for a webinar for two weeks to a month and it's like are you kidding me? that just kills Your webinar registration the ideal we find is actually three days The longer the webinar registration period the lower your attendance and I am comfortable Giving that to you as a definitive statement That's one reason why focusing on the webinar topic for the week before registration opens is key Where because in that we are talking about the webinar topic without mentioning the webinar so in Another video in this module I'm going to talk about this concept of actually starting to shift your communications
